name: Brain Scientific Inc.
summary: Brain Scientific Inc. operates as a neurodiagnostic and predictive technology platform company in the United States. The company provides a platform for data acquisition and analysis of electroencephalography (EEG) data that combines medical device technologies with cloud-based telehealth services. It also offers NeuroCap, a disposable and soft layered cap with an integrated electrode circuit that is designed to address existing problems of conventional EEG systems; and NeuroEEG, a cloud-enabled data acquisition platform for electroencephalogram activity, as well as MemoryMD Cloud, a database where brain data can be stored and analyzed. Brain Scientific Inc. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Bohemia, New York.
